requirements.requirement: Contractor shall perform asbestos abatement and hazardous material remediation in occupied facilities.
requirements.source_quote: removal and lawful disposal of asbestos-containing material

requirements.requirement: Offeror shall demonstrate experience rehabilitating historic buildings while preserving character-defining features.
requirements.source_quote: rehabilitation of a historic structure listed on the National Register

requirements.requirement: Provide FedRAMP-authorized cloud hosting with continuous ATO monitoring and SOC operations.
requirements.source_quote: FedRAMP Moderate authorization and continuous monitoring

requirements.requirement: Contractor shall manage general construction and renovation of federal office space.
requirements.source_quote: general contracting for interior renovation of a federal building
